description: Museo Egizio golden search cases (12): the per-museum accuracy north-star for the Egizio rows in the merged artifact. Authored 2026-07-06 against the 278-row SMOKE snapshot (first ~500 sitemap slugs; the full ~3.6k-row harvest was in flight) — every case uses a row verified present in that snapshot, so the set stays valid as the harvest grows. Includes the museum's world icon that happened to land in the smoke slice: the Turin King List/Royal Canon (Cat_1874, Writing Gallery, floor 3). Note two upstream data quirks the cases deliberately avoid: the King List's medium is spelled 'Papyurs' (sic) and S_1146's title spells 'tatooed' (sic) — queries anchor on correctly-spelled title tokens instead. Tiers mirror the Met set: autocomplete = local FTS top-8; full = all-results; llm = relaxed-FTS stand-in for the interpret tier.

cases.note: the museum's most famous holding; Cat_1874, Writing Gallery (floor 3)
the King List's alternate name, second half of the same catalog title
Provv_3529; Drovetti assembled the founding collection — his name also appears in many Acquisition fields but only this title carries it
Cat_935, Room 11 floor 1; 'statuette' disambiguates from the Sobeknakht/Sobekhotep stelae
Cat_7215; hyphenated title must match the unhyphenated query (tokenizer splits on the hyphen)
S_1220; title is 'Statue of the vizier Iymeru, son of the vizier Ankhu' — word order differs from the query
Cat_1764, Writing Gallery; the title also names Cleopatra and Caesarion
S_1827 C-ware bowl (S_1823 double-jar also passes); Naqada I predynastic pottery

cases.query: the papyrus with the list of all the egyptian kings
cases.note: descriptive phrasing for the icon; 'king'+'list' survive relaxation — 'papyrus' has no title anchor and the row's medium spells it 'Papyurs' (upstream sic)

cases.query: prehistoric ivory tusk carved like a bearded man
cases.note: S_1068; 'bearded' stems to the title's 'bearded', 'ivory' lives in medium ('Organic animal / Ivory')
S_18006 rock graffito in the Roman Wall open-storage display (floor -1); 'carving' is not a title token — rock+african+animals must carry it through relaxation
